meaning: adj.降伏的,沮丧的,衰竭的,俯卧的vt.弄倒,使屈服
examples: He stumbled over Luke's prostrate body.
He hurriedly covered his head with the clothes, prostrate on the sand.
The recent uproars over changes in breasts and prostrate cancer screens are a good example.
Grieving mothers shaped from marble lay prostrate on the lids of stone caskets.
